name: web-push-vapid
description: VAPID-based Web Push notifications. Subscribe / unsubscribe API, per-user subscription storage, server-side send helper.

envVars.name: VAPID_CONTACT
envVars.description: mailto: URL used as the Subject in the VAPID JWT

postInstall: 1. Generate VAPID keys: npx web-push generate-vapid-keys
2. Add the three env vars to your .env
4. Register the service worker (see pwa-service-worker module) — it handles the 'push' event
5. Call subscribeToPush() from your client UI to ask the user for permission and POST a subscription
